personal.name: Aman Kumar
bio: I'm a Software Developer keen to work in organisations that bring excitement to innovation. Besides the skills, I bring to the table an eagerness to learn and engage in collaborative interdisciplinary work. I have built production-grade backend systems, APIs, and automation pipelines for enterprise clients — including Luminous and INGKA (IKEA).

My work spans the full backend lifecycle: from designing database schemas, optimizing Stored Procedures, authoring APIs in .NET Core, to resolving critical production bugs affecting 100–150K users and deploying containerized workloads on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure.
I'm driven by turning complex, ambiguous requirements into clean, maintainable systems. Currently exploring LLM-based test automation and vibe coding to push what's possible in how we build software.

experience.description: Building backend systems and APIs for enterprise clients including Luminous and INGKA (IKEA). Delivered modules spanning API migration, rule engines, push notifications, document verification, and cloud infrastructure POCs.
highlights: Migrated 258 APIs from .NET Framework to .NET Core MVC across mPartner microservices (UserEngagement, ISmart, HomeScreen)
Built configurable Rule Engine for admin-defined reward schemes with geo/user-type filters — validated on live production data
Designed and delivered the Assessment/LMS Module with cascading DB schema — zero post-production bugs
Resolved critical combo sales bug affecting 100–150K users — traced to session-scoped global tables in stored procedures
Built Firebase push notification system with background job running every 5 min via Task Scheduler
Led OCI POC: containerized .NET backend with Load Balancing for High Availability on Oracle Cloud
Implemented document tampering detection using Error Level Analysis (ELA) and Double Compression algorithms

experience.description: Contributed to live client projects from day one across Luminous Sales One and mPartner. Built APIs, bulk sale features, document verification, and geolocation tooling. Rated Exceptional Achiever on majority of deliverables.
highlights: Built ASM and distributor/dealer mapping APIs for Luminous Sales One project
Developed Secondary Bulk Sale feature — up to 1000 product registrations per batch via Excel upload
Built Tertiary Bulk Sale with OTP creation/verification and SMS stored procedure for multi-serial delivery
Integrated Signzy for real-time Aadhaar, PAN, KYC and passport verification
Built GeoLocation Finder standalone app using Google Geocoding API
Developed Common File Upload Service utility used across multiple microservices

projects.title: mPartner — 258 API Migration
projects.subtitle: Luminous · Truminds
projects.description: Led migration of 258 APIs from .NET Framework to .NET Core MVC across UserEngagement, ISmart, and HomeScreen/Login microservices — zero regression, improved platform performance.

projects.title: Rule Engine — Rewards Platform
projects.subtitle: Luminous · Truminds
projects.description: Built a configurable Rule Engine enabling admins to define reward schemes via geo filters (region, state, district, pincode) and user-type filters. Validated against a full month of live production data. Rated Exceptional Achiever.

projects.title: Automated RDLC Reporting System
projects.subtitle: Truminds
projects.description: Built a production-grade automated reporting system on Classic .NET Framework. A Task Scheduler-driven console application handles FTR data uploads to the DB on a defined schedule — shipped cleanly with no post-production issues.

projects.title: Firebase Push Notification System
projects.subtitle: Luminous · Truminds
projects.description: Built the backend architecture for a Firebase push notification system. A background job runs every 5 minutes via Task Scheduler, triggering alerts for sales events, dealer creation, and approval workflows through the Admin Portal.

projects.title: Document Tampering Detection
projects.subtitle: Truminds R&D
projects.description: Python-based document authenticity system using Error Level Analysis (ELA) and Double Compression algorithms to detect subtle digital artefacts introduced by image editing tools.

projects.title: OCI Cloud Infrastructure POC
projects.subtitle: Truminds R&D
projects.description: Deployed a containerized and VM-based .NET backend on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure with Load Balancing for High Availability — completed alongside active sprint commitments as a concurrent R&D initiative.

projects.title: Panasonic MirAIe — Frontend
projects.subtitle: Panasonic · Truminds
projects.description: Developed the Tenant Info screen, workspace selection bottom sheet, and device status cards for the Panasonic MirAIe smart home app in React Native — following Figma design specifications.

projects.title: Digital-Products
projects.subtitle: Personal Project
projects.description: A personal web project built for couples — exploring shared digital experiences. Built independently as a learning project.

projects.title: LLM-Based Test Automation
projects.subtitle: Personal R&D
projects.description: Exploring automated test case generation using LLMs and vibe coding workflows — reducing manual QA effort by generating and validating test suites from natural language requirements.

certifications.title: TruRising Star Award
certifications.description: Recognized for consistent high-impact delivery and contributions across client workstreams (Luminous, INGKA) in the first year as an SDE-1.

certifications.title: Algorithms
certifications.description: Certificate of Excellence - 99%, for completing the algorithms within the deadline and a final score surpassing 99.99 of the batchmates

certifications.title: NodeJS Online Course
certifications.description: Course Completion - Demonstrated practical proficiency in building scalable server-side applications and robust RESTful APIs.

certifications.title: Python Bootcamp
certifications.description: Certificate of Completion - Learned core Python concepts, object-oriented programming, and scripting, demonstrating the ability to build functional real-world applications and automate complex workflows.
